Deacon William "Don" Terry III, Syracuse, passed away peacefully went home with Lord October 2018, University Hospital, Syracuse,
loving family side.
born William Esther Terry December 1958 Hampton,
educated until moving Syracuse nine.
attended Syracuse City Public Schools, graduating from Henninger High School where played football, shotput (track field).
named State First Team-Class 1977.
went study Hobart College.
member Jerusalem Missionary Baptist Church, Cummings, where served Deacons Board, Trustees Board, Missionary Department, former Sunday School Teacher Head Youth Department.
formerly employed Upstate University Hospital thirty-eight years until retiring July, 2018.
very passionate about serving Lord; and, served Lord fervently.
enjoyed participating church activities functions.
also volunteered Rescue Mission mentor Project Search Program.
avid sports enjoyed watching good game football.
served Terry-Lightsey Family Reunion Committee since 2006.
reunions, enjoyed fried fish infamous iced peanut butter cookies.
caring, calming spirit everyone.
And, showed.
always encouraging motivating others Better".
unselfish always others before himself.
Known many "Uncle Don" gentle giant widest smile highly contagious laugh.
will miss conversation starter... "Let question".
preceded death sister, Loretta Miller.
Deacon William "Don" Terry leaves mourn passing, cherish memory, celebrate life five children: Darina Marie Brown Donniesha Shareese Terry, both Syracuse, J'Quan Dimitri Slaughter Rock Hill, Daquan Terry Atlanta, Brittani D'lyce Terry Syracuse, mother father: Esther William Terry Early Branch, sisters: Mildred Webb Pamela Michelle Terry, brother Alexander Terry Sr., Syracuse, host nieces nephews, family good friends.
